name: Wise (multi-currency / no-FX)
one_liner: Send money internationally at near mid-market rates — essential for newcomers remitting home.
benefit: Convert and send money in 50+ currencies at the mid-market rate with low transparent fees; Wise debit card spends in local currency with no FX mark-up; receive money in multiple currencies with local account details; far cheaper than bank telegraphic transfers.
signup_bonus: ~$50–75 AUD equivalent fee-free transfer for new customers via referral (check current terms)
referral_note: Get a referral via OzBargain's referral threads/randomiser so both you and the referrer get the bonus.

how_to_join.action: Get a referral link from OzBargain's Wise referral thread or from a friend
Sign up at wise.com via the referral link
how_to_join.detail: Create a Wise account with your email; identity verification required (passport).

how_to_join.action: Open a Wise multi-currency account and order a Wise Visa debit card
Make your first qualifying transfer to unlock the fee-free bonus

prerequisites: Passport or government-issued ID for identity verification
risks: Wise is not a bank in AU — deposits are not covered by the Australian government guarantee scheme
Transfer fees are low but not zero; compare rates for large transfers against your bank
Identity verification can take 1–3 business days for new accounts
est_value: ~$50–75 fee-free transfer bonus + saves ~2–4% vs bank FX fees on every international transfer
